title: Claude Code hook stdout JSON contract
description: Pre-emit schema validator for ~/.claude/hooks/**.sh stdout JSON. Plan 84 SP03. hookEventName enum EXCLUDES PreCompact (closes PreCompact Bug 1 class). additionalProperties:false at every level (catches typo'd field names at write-time). additionalContext maxLength:10240 (encodes B3 community-docs 10K cap).

hookEventName.description: Verified-valid hook event names. PreCompact is INTENTIONALLY EXCLUDED — Claude Code rejects it silently (the defect that hid PreCompact Bug 1 for >1 year).

permissionDecision.description: PreToolUse permission verdict. Harness enforces deny structurally.

permissionDecisionReason.description: Human-readable reason for permissionDecision; surfaces in deny rationale.

additionalContext.description: Free-text context appended to model turn. 10K char cap per Claude Code community docs (B3 finding).
